item.title: GMR Power & Urban Infra Ltd Surges 8.67% to Day's High of Rs 111 — Outperforms Sector by 5.26 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex rose 1.04% on 14 Jun 2026, yet GMR Power & Urban Infra Ltd outpaced the broader market with an 8.67% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 111. This 5.26 percentage-point outperformance over the Power sector signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: Authum Investment & Infrastructure Ltd Surges 5.48% to Day's High of Rs 504 — Outperforms Sector by 5.6 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.94% on 14 Jun 2026, yet Authum Investment & Infrastructure Ltd outpaced both the benchmark and its sector peers with a 5.48% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 504. This 5.6 percentage-point outperformance signals a stock-specific strength rather than a broad market lift. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Oxford Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 22.24
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Oxford Industries Ltd reached a fresh 52-week high of Rs 22.24 on 14 May 2026, propelled by a remarkable 50.68% gain over the past 21 trading sessions. This rally has been underpinned by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained price momentum, setting the stock apart in a market where the Sensex trades cautiously below key moving averages. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Raghav Productivity Enhancers Ltd Surges 7.86% to Day's High of Rs 794.75 — Outperforms Sector by 6.65 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.60% on 14 Jun 2026, yet Raghav Productivity Enhancers Ltd outpaced the broader market with a robust 7.86% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 794.75. This 6.65-percentage-point outperformance over its sector underscores a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Saregama India Ltd Surges 7.97% to Day's High of Rs 351.35 — Outperforms Sector by 4.44 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.6% on 14 May 2026, yet Saregama India Ltd outpaced the broader market with a robust 7.97% gain, reaching an intraday peak of Rs 351.35. This 4.44 percentage-point outperformance over its Media & Entertainment sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Bharti Airtel Ltd Surges 3.32% to Day's High of Rs 1844.95 — Outperforms Sector by 0.72 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.60% on 14 Jun 2026, yet Bharti Airtel Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 3.32% gain, reaching an intraday peak of Rs 1844.95. This 0.72 percentage-point outperformance over the Telecom - Services sector's 2.6% rise highlights a stock-specific strength rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Tube Investments of India Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Shares of Tube Investments of India Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 2,779, down 5.5% as the stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices amid persistent selling pressure and subdued market sentiment. Time: 33 minutes ago

item.title: Zydus Lifesciences Ltd Rallies 5.15% and Approaches Key Moving Averages — Momentum Builds
item.description: The Sensex remained flat on 14 Jun 2026, but Zydus Lifesciences Ltd surged 5.15%, outperforming its Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector by nearly 3.9 percentage points. This strong single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly subdued market environment. Time: 34 minutes ago

item.title: Pennar Industries Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 14 May 2026
item.description: Pennar Industries Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 14 May 2026, touching a low of Rs 150.4, down 7.13% from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting immediate price pressures and subdued market sentiment. Time: 34 minutes ago

item.title: Swiggy Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 251.6 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the fourth consecutive session, Swiggy Ltd has closed lower, culminating in a fresh 52-week low of Rs 251.6 on 14 May 2026. This marks a significant 46.9% decline from its 52-week high of Rs 473, underscoring persistent selling pressure despite some pockets of sector resilience. Time: 43 minutes ago

item.title: Five Consecutive Losses Push NIIT Learning Systems Ltd to a New 52-Week Low
item.description: NIIT Learning Systems Ltd’s stock price reached a fresh 52-week low of Rs.236.1 on 14 May 2026, marking a significant decline amid a sustained downward trend. The stock has underperformed both its sector and broader market indices, reflecting ongoing pressures on its valuation and performance metrics. Time: 43 minutes ago

item.title: Tata Elxsi Ltd. Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 3955 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the fourth consecutive session, Tata Elxsi Ltd. has closed lower, culminating in a fresh 52-week low of Rs 3955 on 14 May 2026. This marks a significant 41.3% decline from its 52-week high of Rs 6733.5, underscoring the persistent pressure on the stock amid a broader sector downturn. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Five Consecutive Losses Push Galaxy Bearings Ltd to a New 52-Week Low
item.description: Galaxy Bearings Ltd’s stock price declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 460.5 on 14 May 2026, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing downward trajectory. The stock has underperformed both its sector and benchmark indices, reflecting persistent financial pressures and subdued market sentiment. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Shaily Engineering Plastics Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 2838.6
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 2838.6 on 14 May 2026, Shaily Engineering Plastics Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week and all-time high, marking a remarkable 63.98% gain over the past year. This rally stands in stark contrast to the broader Sensex, which has declined 8.30% over the same period, underscoring the stock's strong momentum despite a challenging market backdrop. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Kanoria Chemicals & Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 104.7
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 104.7 on 14 Jun 2026, Kanoria Chemicals & Industries Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum. This advance comes amid a backdrop of strong technical signals and a market environment where the broader Sensex is struggling to maintain its footing. Time: 44 minutes ago
